add-auto-numbered-column-to-pdf-table.title: Add Auto‑Numbered Column to PDF Table
add-auto-numbered-column-to-pdf-table.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF table with Aspose.Pdf and insert sequential numbers into the first column of each row.

add-bullet-list-in-table-cell.title: Add a Bullet List Inside a Table Cell
add-bullet-list-in-table-cell.description: Shows how to create a bullet list within a PDF table cell by adding separate TextFragment paragraphs prefixed with a bullet character.

add-centered-paragraph-to-table-cell.title: Center Text in Table Cell of a PDF
add-centered-paragraph-to-table-cell.description: Shows how to create a PDF, add a table, and place a centered paragraph (text fragment) inside a cell using Aspose.Pdf.

add-checkbox-field-in-table-cell.title: Add Checkbox Form Field Inside Table Cell
add-checkbox-field-in-table-cell.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF with a table, adding text to a cell, and inserting a CheckboxField form element inside that cell using Aspose.Pdf.

add-footer-row-to-tagged-pdf-table.title: Add Footer Row to Tagged PDF Table
add-footer-row-to-tagged-pdf-table.description: Shows how to create a table with header, body, and a footer that appears at the bottom of each page when the table spans multiple pages in a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-footnote-references-in-table-cells.title: Add Footnote References in Table Cells
add-footnote-references-in-table-cells.description: Demonstrates how to insert superscript footnote references inside table cells and associate them with footnote paragraphs at the end of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-hyperlink-to-table-cell.title: Add Hyperlink to Table Cell in PDF
add-hyperlink-to-table-cell.description: Demonstrates how to insert a web hyperlink into a table cell by creating a LinkAnnotation and adding it to the page.

add-multiline-text-to-table-cell.title: Add Multiline Text to a Table Cell
add-multiline-text-to-table-cell.description: Shows how to create a PDF table cell containing multiple lines by adding separate TextFragment objects and a line‑break fragment.

add-radio-button-group-inside-table-cell.title: Add Radio Button Group Inside a Table Cell
add-radio-button-group-inside-table-cell.description: Demonstrates creating a radio button group, defining its options, and placing the group inside a table cell of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-semi-transparent-background-color-to.title: Add Semi-Transparent Background Color to PDF Table
add-semi-transparent-background-color-to.description: Demonstrates how to create a table in a PDF and set a semi‑transparent background color using Aspose.Pdf.

add-table-to-page.title: Add Table to Specific PDF Page
add-table-to-page.description: Demonstrates how to create a table and insert it into a specific page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

add-text-to-table-cell.title: Add Text with Font and Size to Table Cell
add-text-to-table-cell.description: Demonstrates how to create a TextFragment, set its font and size, and insert it into a table cell in a PDF document.

adjust-table-column-widths.title: Adjust Table Column Widths Proportionally in PDF
adjust-table-column-widths.description: Shows how to compute total column width, convert each width to a percentage, and assign those percentages to a Table's ColumnWidths so the columns scale proportionally in a PDF document.

alternating-row-background-colors.title: Apply Alternating Row Background Colors in PDF Table
alternating-row-background-colors.description: Creates a PDF document with a table and demonstrates how to set alternating background colors for rows by iterating over the table rows and applying a color based on the row index parity.

apply-autofitbehavior-tables.title: Apply Different AutoFitBehavior Settings to Tables in a PDF
apply-autofitbehavior-tables.description: Demonstrates how to set distinct AutoFitBehavior values for separate tables in the same PDF document, resulting in different sizing behavior.

apply-conditional-formatting-to-pdf-tabl.title: Apply Conditional Formatting to PDF Table Cells
apply-conditional-formatting-to-pdf-tabl.description: Demonstrates how to color PDF table cells based on numeric values using Aspose.Pdf, applying red, yellow, or green backgrounds according to defined thresholds.

apply-double-border-to-pdf-table.title: Apply Double Border Style to a PDF Table
apply-double-border-to-pdf-table.description: Shows how to add a table to an existing PDF and set a double‑line border using GraphInfo and BorderInfo.

apply-solid-border-table.title: Apply Solid Border to Table in PDF
apply-solid-border-table.description: Demonstrates how to set a solid border for an entire table using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

auto-adjust-row-height-in-pdf-table.title: Auto‑adjust Row Height in PDF Table
auto-adjust-row-height-in-pdf-table.description: Loads an existing PDF, adds a table, sets the row's MinRowHeight to 0 to enable automatic height adjustment, inserts short and long text cells, and saves the result.

auto-fit-table-columns-after-importing-d.title: Auto‑Fit Table Columns After Importing Data
auto-fit-table-columns-after-importing-d.description: Shows how to load a PDF template, import a DataTable into an Aspose.Pdf.Table, automatically adjust column widths using AutoFit, and save the updated PDF.

auto-fit-table-columns.title: AutoFit Table Columns to Content in PDF
auto-fit-table-columns.description: Demonstrates setting ColumnAdjustment to AutoFitToContent so that table columns automatically resize to fit their cell contents.

batch-add-logo-table.title: Batch Add Company Logo Table to PDFs
batch-add-logo-table.description: Processes all PDF files in a folder, adds a two‑column table containing a company logo and name to the first page of each document, and saves the results with new filenames.

batch-replace-tables.title: Batch Replace Tables in Multiple PDFs
batch-replace-tables.description: Demonstrates how to locate tables in several PDF files using TableAbsorber and replace each with a new table built from a DataTable.

calculate-remaining-page-space.title: Calculate Remaining Page Space Before Adding a Table
calculate-remaining-page-space.description: Demonstrates how to compute the available vertical space on a PDF page by subtracting margins and existing content height, then adds a table within that space.

center-align-table.title: Center Align Table in PDF
center-align-table.description: Demonstrates how to center a Table on a PDF page by setting its HorizontalAlignment property.

check-table-broken.title: Check if Table Breaks Across Pages
check-table-broken.description: Creates a PDF with a large table, adds it to a page, and checks the Table.IsBroken property to determine if the table will be split across pages.

count-tables-in-pdf-using-tableabsorber.title: Count Tables in a PDF using TableAbsorber
count-tables-in-pdf-using-tableabsorber.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber to detect and count tables in a PDF document.

create-modify-retrieve-table.title: Create, Modify, and Retrieve Tables in PDF
create-modify-retrieve-table.description: Demonstrates how to create a table in a PDF, save it, then extract and modify its content using TableAbsorber.

create-pdf-table-shadow-effect-limit.title: Create PDF Table and Explain Shadow Effect Limitation
create-pdf-table-shadow-effect-limit.description: Demonstrates how to build a formatted table in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and notes that the Table class does not expose a ShadowEffect property, so a native shadow cannot be applied directly.

create-pdf-table-with-dynamic-row-count.title: Create PDF Table with Dynamic Row Count
create-pdf-table-with-dynamic-row-count.description: Shows how to load a PDF, determine the number of rows in a DataTable, import the data into an Aspose.Pdf.Table, and save the updated document.

create-table-pdf.title: Create Table with Rows and Columns in PDF
create-table-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to instantiate a Table, add rows and cells, and place it into a PDF document.

create-table-with-repeating-header.title: Create PDF Table with Repeating Header Row
create-table-with-repeating-header.description: Demonstrates how to build a PDF table and mark its first row as a header that repeats on each new page using Aspose.Pdf.

create-table-with-rows.title: Create Table with Rows and Cells in PDF
create-table-with-rows.description: Demonstrates how to programmatically create a table, add rows and cells, and save the PDF.

custom-row-height-pdf-table.title: Custom Row Height in PDF Table
custom-row-height-pdf-table.description: Creates a PDF document with a table and demonstrates how to set a fixed height for specific rows using the FixedRowHeight property, while leaving other rows to auto‑size.

detect-merged-cells-in-pdf-tables.title: Detect Merged Cells in PDF Tables with TableAbsorber
detect-merged-cells-in-pdf-tables.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber to locate tables in a PDF and determine if any cells are merged by checking their RowSpan and ColumnSpan values.

disable-table-splitting.title: Disable Table Splitting in PDF
disable-table-splitting.description: Demonstrates how to prevent a table from automatically breaking across pages by setting Table.IsBroken to false.

embed-html-in-table-cell.title: Embed HTML Markup in Table Cell
embed-html-in-table-cell.description: Demonstrates how to embed HTML markup inside a PDF table cell by adding an HtmlFragment to the cell's paragraph collection.

enable-table-splitting.title: Enable Table Splitting Across Pages
enable-table-splitting.description: Demonstrates how to allow a table to break across multiple pages by setting Table.IsBroken to true before rendering.

export-pdf-table-to-csv.title: Export PDF Table to CSV
export-pdf-table-to-csv.description: Shows how to load a PDF document containing a table and save its data as a CSV file using Aspose.Pdf's ExcelSaveOptions.

export-table-structure-to-json.title: Export Table Structure to JSON from Tagged PDF
export-table-structure-to-json.description: Loads a PDF, accesses its tagged content to locate a table, iterates through rows and cells extracting actual and alternative text, and writes the structure to a formatted JSON file.

extract-modify-table.title: Extract and Modify Table Cells Using TableAbsorber
extract-modify-table.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF with a table, detect the table using TableAbsorber, read and change a cell's text, and save the result.

extract-pdf-tables-to-datatables.title: Extract PDF Tables to DataTables using TableAbsorber
extract-pdf-tables-to-datatables.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber to locate tables in a PDF document and convert each table into a System.Data.DataTable, filling rows and columns with the cell text.

extract-table-cell-text.title: Extract Text from Table Cells using TableAbsorber
extract-table-cell-text.description: Demonstrates how to locate tables in a PDF with TableAbsorber and read the concatenated text of each cell.

extract-table-coordinates-from-pdf.title: Extract Table Coordinates from PDF using TableAbsorber
extract-table-coordinates-from-pdf.description: Shows how to locate tables in a PDF with TableAbsorber and retrieve each table's bounding rectangle coordinates (LLX, LLY, URX, URY).

extract-tables-from-pdf-using-tableabsor.title: Extract Tables from PDF Using TableAbsorber
extract-tables-from-pdf-using-tableabsor.description: Shows how to load a PDF, use Aspose.Pdf.TableAbsorber to locate tables, iterate through rows and cells, and read the text fragments within each cell.

extract-tables-from-rotated-pdf-pages.title: Extract Tables from Rotated PDF Pages Using TableAbsorber
extract-tables-from-rotated-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to check each page's rotation angle and use TableAbsorber to locate and list tables on rotated PDF pages.

extract-tables-to-csv-using-tableabsorbe.title: Extract Tables from PDF to CSV using TableAbsorber
extract-tables-to-csv-using-tableabsorbe.description: Demonstrates how to locate tables in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber and write each table to a separate CSV file, handling cell text concatenation and CSV escaping.

fixed-width-table.title: Create a Table with Fixed Width in PDF
fixed-width-table.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF table with a fixed width of 500 points using Aspose.PDF for .NET.

generate-pdf-report-multiple-tables.title: Generate PDF Report with Multiple Tables from DataTables
generate-pdf-report-multiple-tables.description: Shows how to create a PDF document where each page contains a titled table imported from a DataTable, using Aspose.Pdf styling and layout features.

generate-pdf-table-from-datatable.title: Generate PDF Table from DataTable
generate-pdf-table-from-datatable.description: Shows how to import an in‑memory DataTable into an Aspose.Pdf.Table, configure basic appearance, and save the result as a PDF, with cross‑platform handling for GDI+.

import-datatable-into-pdf-table.title: Import DataTable into PDF Table
import-datatable-into-pdf-table.description: Demonstrates how to import an in‑memory DataTable into an Aspose.Pdf.Table and save the result as a PDF.

import-datatable-with-images-into-pdf-ta.title: Import DataTable with Images into PDF Table
import-datatable-with-images-into-pdf-ta.description: Shows how to import a DataTable that contains text and image byte arrays into an Aspose.Pdf Table and replace the image cells with Image objects so the images render inside the PDF table.

import-dataview-table.title: Import Filtered DataView into PDF Table
import-dataview-table.description: Demonstrates how to import a filtered DataView into an Aspose.Pdf Table using Table.ImportDataView.

import-filtered-dataview-table.title: Import Filtered DataView into PDF Table
import-filtered-dataview-table.description: Demonstrates how to filter a DataView and import the filtered rows into a PDF table using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-external-image-into-table-cell.title: Insert External Image into Table Cell
insert-external-image-into-table-cell.description: Shows how to embed an external image file into a PDF table cell using Aspose.Pdf's Image class.

insert-image-into-table-cell.title: Insert Image from Memory Stream into Table Cell
insert-image-into-table-cell.description: Demonstrates how to embed an image from a memory stream into a PDF table cell using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

insert-new-column-into-pdf-table.title: Insert a New Column into a PDF Table
insert-new-column-into-pdf-table.description: Demonstrates how to add a new column to the first table in a PDF by inserting an empty cell into each row at a specified index using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-page-break-table.title: Insert Page Break in Table Using NewPageFragment
insert-page-break-table.description: Demonstrates how to insert a NewPageFragment after a specific table row to force a page break between rows.

insert-svg-into-cell.title: Insert SVG Image into Table Cell
insert-svg-into-cell.description: Demonstrates how to embed an SVG image into a table cell in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-table-after-paragraph.title: Insert Table After Specific Paragraph in PDF
insert-table-after-paragraph.description: Demonstrates how to locate a paragraph by its text and insert a new table immediately after it in a PDF document.

insert-table-at-specific-position.title: Insert Table at Specific Position in PDF
insert-table-at-specific-position.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, create a Table, set its X/Y coordinates using Left and Top properties, add rows, and save the document.

insert-table-before-image.title: Insert Table Before an Image in PDF
insert-table-before-image.description: Demonstrates how to locate an image on a PDF page, insert a table before it, and save the result.

insert-table-into-paragraph-collection.title: Insert Table into Paragraph Collection
insert-table-into-paragraph-collection.description: Shows how to add a table as a paragraph element by inserting it into a page's paragraph collection after a text fragment.

insert-table-into-pdf.title: Insert Table into PDF at Specific Position
insert-table-into-pdf.description: Creates a sample PDF, then inserts a constructed table at a given location on the first page.

insert-table-into-pdf__v2.title: Insert Table into Existing PDF
insert-table-into-pdf__v2.description: Creates a sample PDF, reopens it, adds a formatted table to the first page, and saves the result.

insert-table-into-textbox-form-field.title: Insert Table into TextBox Form Field
insert-table-into-textbox-form-field.description: Demonstrates how to create a TextBox form field and embed a tagged table as its appearance using Aspose.Pdf.

load-table-from-xml.title: Load Table Definition from XML and Render to PDF
load-table-from-xml.description: Demonstrates loading a table definition from an XML file into a DataTable, converting it to an Aspose.Pdf.Table, and saving the result as a PDF.

map-datatable-columns-to-pdf-table.title: Map DataTable Columns to Specific PDF Table Columns
map-datatable-columns-to-pdf-table.description: Demonstrates how to import selected DataTable columns into specific columns of an Aspose.Pdf Table using a column mapping dictionary.

merge-table-cells-colspan.title: Merge Table Cells Using ColSpan in Aspose.Pdf
merge-table-cells-colspan.description: Demonstrates how to merge three adjacent columns in a PDF table by setting the Cell.ColSpan property to 3.

merge-table-cells-rowspan.title: Merge Table Cells Vertically Using RowSpan
merge-table-cells-rowspan.description: Demonstrates how to merge a table cell with the cell below by setting the Cell.RowSpan property to 2.

offset-table-left-margin.title: Offset Table from Left Margin in PDF
offset-table-left-margin.description: Demonstrates how to offset a Table from the left margin by setting its Margin.Left property.

populate-table-from-linq.title: Populate PDF Table from LINQ Query using DataTable
populate-table-from-linq.description: Demonstrates converting a LINQ query result to a DataTable and importing it into an Aspose.Pdf.Table within a PDF document.

read-table-width.title: Read Calculated Table Width after Layout
read-table-width.description: Creates a PDF with a table, forces layout, and reads the table's calculated width using Table.GetWidth().

remove-all-tables-from-pdf.title: Remove All Tables from a PDF Document
remove-all-tables-from-pdf.description: Shows how to locate every table in a PDF using TableAbsorber, delete each table with Remove, and save the updated document.

remove-all-tables.title: Remove All Tables from a PDF
remove-all-tables.description: Creates a sample PDF containing a table, then loads it and removes all table structures while preserving the remaining content.

remove-table-column-from-pdf.title: Remove a Column from a PDF Table
remove-table-column-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to locate a table on a PDF page with TableAbsorber, rebuild the table without a specific column, and replace the original table using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-table-from-pdf.title: Remove a Table from a PDF using TableAbsorber
remove-table-from-pdf.description: Shows how to locate tables on a PDF page with TableAbsorber, remove a selected table, and save the updated document.

remove-tables-containing-keyword.title: Remove Tables Containing a Keyword from PDF
remove-tables-containing-keyword.description: Demonstrates how to scan all tables in a PDF, detect a specific keyword in any cell, and delete the entire table using Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber.

render-table-high-dpi-images.title: Render Table with High‑DPI Images in PDF and HTML
render-table-high-dpi-images.description: Creates a PDF containing a two‑column table with images, then saves the document as HTML while increasing the image DPI using HtmlSaveOptions.ImageResolution.

render-table-new-page.title: Render Table on New PDF Page
render-table-new-page.description: Creates a PDF, adds a new page, builds a simple table and places it on the page.

render-wide-table-landscape.title: Render Wide Table in Landscape Orientation
render-wide-table-landscape.description: Shows how to switch a PDF page to landscape orientation, adjust its size, and add a wide table that fits within the page using Aspose.Pdf.

reorder-table-columns-in-pdf.title: Reorder Table Columns in a PDF
reorder-table-columns-in-pdf.description: Shows how to reorder the columns of tables in a PDF by extracting cell contents, rearranging them according to a specified order, and replacing the original tables using Aspose.Pdf.

repeat-table-column-header.title: Repeat Table Column Header on Each Page
repeat-table-column-header.description: Demonstrates how to mark a table column as a header and enable column repeat so the column stays visible on each new page of a PDF.

replace-merged-table-cells.title: Replace Merged Table Cells with Separate Cells in PDF
replace-merged-table-cells.description: Shows how to absorb a table from a PDF, split cells that span multiple columns into individual cells, and replace the original table using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-table-cell-text-by-keyword.title: Replace Table Cell Text Containing Keyword in PDF
replace-table-cell-text-by-keyword.description: Shows how to locate tables in a PDF, search for a keyword inside table cells, and replace the entire cell content with new text using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-table.title: Replace Table in PDF Using TableAbsorber
replace-table.description: Demonstrates how to replace an existing table in a PDF by removing the absorbed table and inserting a new table at the same position using TableAbsorber.

right-align-table.title: Right‑Align Table in PDF
right-align-table.description: Shows how to align a table to the right margin of a PDF page by setting its HorizontalAlignment to Right and adjusting the left margin.

rotate-page-add-table.title: Rotate PDF Page and Insert a Table
rotate-page-add-table.description: Demonstrates how to rotate a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf and then add a styled table to the rotated page before saving the document.

rotate-table-90-degrees-matrix.title: Render a 90° Rotated Table Using a Transformation Matrix
rotate-table-90-degrees-matrix.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF with a table, applying a 90‑degree rotation matrix to the page, and saving the document while handling platform‑specific GDI+ issues.

rotate-text-in-pdf-table-cell.title: Rotate Text Inside a PDF Table Cell
rotate-text-in-pdf-table-cell.description: Shows how to rotate text within a table cell of a PDF by setting the TextFragment's rotation property using Aspose.Pdf.

serialize-table-to-xml.title: Serialize Table to XML
serialize-table-to-xml.description: Creates a PDF document with a simple table, then exports the document to XML using Aspose.Pdf's XmlSaveOptions. Includes cross‑platform handling for GDI+ dependencies.

set-cell-background-color.title: Set Cell Background Color in PDF Table
set-cell-background-color.description: Demonstrates how to set the background color of a specific table cell using the Cell.BackgroundColor property.

set-cell-margins.title: Set Custom Cell Margins in PDF Table
set-cell-margins.description: Demonstrates how to configure custom margins for a table cell using MarginInfo and assign it to the cell's Margin property.

set-cell-vertical-alignment.title: Set Cell Vertical Alignment to Middle in PDF Table
set-cell-vertical-alignment.description: Demonstrates how to set the vertical alignment of a table cell to middle (center) using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

set-fixed-row-height-table-pdf.title: Set Fixed Row Height for Table Rows in PDF
set-fixed-row-height-table-pdf.description: Creates a PDF document with a table whose header and data rows all share a fixed height by setting the FixedRowHeight property, then saves the file.

set-maximum-column-width-for-pdf-table.title: Set Maximum Column Width for PDF Table
set-maximum-column-width-for-pdf-table.description: Shows how to create a table in a PDF with fixed column widths and enable word‑wrap so content does not exceed the specified width using Aspose.Pdf.

set-minimum-column-width.title: Set Minimum Column Width for PDF Table
set-minimum-column-width.description: Shows how to enforce a minimum column width in an Aspose.Pdf table by setting the Table.DefaultColumnWidth property and saving the PDF document.

set-table-border-thickness.title: Set Table Border Thickness in PDF
set-table-border-thickness.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF with a 2‑column, 2‑row table and configuring the table's border thickness to 2 points using BorderInfo before rendering.

set-table-default-cell-padding.title: Set Default Cell Padding for a Table
set-table-default-cell-padding.description: Demonstrates how to define a default cell padding for an entire table by assigning a MarginInfo instance to Table.DefaultCellPadding.

set-table-width-percentage.title: Set Table Width to 80% of Page Width
set-table-width-percentage.description: Demonstrates how to set a table's width to 80 percent of the page width by using the ColumnWidths property.

set-table-z-index.title: Set Table Z-Index in PDF
set-table-z-index.description: Demonstrates how to add a table to an existing PDF and control its overlapping order by setting the ZIndex property. The example positions the table, fills cells with text, and saves the modified document.

stretch-table-to-page-width.title: Stretch Table to Page Width in PDF
stretch-table-to-page-width.description: Shows how to make a table span the full width of a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf by setting column widths (or AutoFitBehavior) based on the page width.

style-header-row.title: Style Header Row in PDF Table
style-header-row.description: Demonstrates how to set a background color and bold font for the header row of a PDF table using Aspose.Pdf.

update-table-cells.title: Update Table Cell Values in PDF
update-table-cells.description: Creates a PDF, adds a table, then programmatically changes the content of specific cells using the Cell class.
